name: Geoplin
message: Geoplin is a leading supplier of natural gas in Slovenia, providing reliable and flexible energy solutions since 1975. The company caters to a diverse clientele, including industries, commercial sectors, and residential customers, by offering a range of services such as energy optimization and industrial lighting. Geoplin is also focused on environmental responsibility, promoting natural gas as a cleaner energy source to support the transition to a low-carbon society. With operations extending into neighboring countries, Geoplin is committed to adapting its offerings to meet the individual needs of its customers.
